subject: WM-0098 ready for review
body: Created M7 planning-only package, DAG and proposed WM-0099 through WM-0110 task packets from verified WM-0097 future M7 prompt; updated roadmap/project-state planning markers; no M7 implementation, public release, owner-gated action or M8 work started; required gates passed with isolated bench rerun passing after one recorded non-acceptance slow-sample failure.
